creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update GNOME to 3.28.

Including the usual glib and gtk updates.

I don't really care about 10.4, since it EOL is just a few months away. It should build fine though. I think a exp-run on HEAD / amd64 and 11.1/11.2 / i386 should be fine. Or the other way around with regards to the FreeBSD version and archs.
